Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 13}Крім карт Менших аркан, які іноді з'являються під час перетасування, також рідко можуть з'являтися {f 0 1 2}карти Старших аркан{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}Only one of each Major Arcana card may be acquired per expedition{f 0 1 27}. The number of Major Arcana cards you can acquire in the same trip to the Abyss of Time is also limited.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}When you've acquired the maximum number of Major Arcana cards, an {f 0 1 2}Arcana Burst{f 0 1 27} will occur and increase the ranks of your Minor Arcana cards. Collect as many Major Arcana cards as you can.[n]{f 1 1}
